description_long: This is a vintage Royal typewriter with a robust, dark metallic body and a classic, slightly textured finish. The front features a full set of cream-colored, round keys with black lettering, arranged in a traditional typewriter layout, and a prominent metallic 'ROYAL' logo above the keyboard. The top section houses a paper feed mechanism, visible with a sheet of paper inserted, and a large, metallic carriage return lever on the left. The sides reveal mechanical components, including exposed gears and rollers, as well as the carriage return lever and adjustment knobs. The rear is solid and unadorned, with the main housing enclosing the internal mechanisms. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, reflecting mid-20th-century office equipment aesthetics.
description: A vintage Royal typewriter with a dark metallic body, cream-colored round keys, and a prominent carriage return lever. The design is classic and robust, with visible mechanical components and a paper feed mechanism.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, 'ROYAL' logo, and paper feed with a sheet inserted.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the carriage return lever, side panel, and part of the internal mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the width of the typewriter.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the carriage return lever from a different angle and the right-side adjustment knob.
